headline: 今日AI速览：学术研究最活跃
narrative:
今日共收录232篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究149篇, 开源项目40篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API13篇。热门标签：Agent（55篇）。其中17%的文章有多来源交叉验证。

▸ addyosmani /agent-skills：Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.

▸ jbeder /yaml-cpp：A YAML parser and emitter in C++

▸ mattpocock /skills：Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.

▸ obra /superpowers：An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

▸ Kyutai Releases MuScriptor: An Open-Weight Decoder-Only Transformer for Multi-Instrument Music Transcription to MIDI：MuScriptor is an open-weight, decoder-only Transformer from Kyutai and Mirelo. Trained on 170k real
text: 今日共收录232篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究149篇, 开源项目40篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API13篇。热门标签：Agent（55篇）。其中17%的文章有多来源交叉验证。
